trades.reason: Overnight crash on Liberation Day. Did NOT follow playbook.
Quick swap from TURBO (knockout risk) to BULL (safe). Metals disagree x3 exit.

lessons.lesson: FOLLOW YOUR OWN PLAYBOOK. We wrote Liberation Day rules (no overnight, wider stops) and ignored them. Cost: -620 SEK. The playbook existed, the data supported it, and we overrode it because trusted signals said 4B/1S.
lessons.fix: When a dated playbook exists for a known event, it overrides signal consensus. Signals dont know about events.

lessons.lesson: Crash days close near the low — only 22% average recovery from intraday low across 24 crash days. Dont try to buy the dip on the crash day itself.
lessons.fix: On crash days (>3% drop), do NOT enter LONG. Wait for next day. 67% bounce probability on day after crash.

lessons.lesson: Thursday is silvers worst day — avg -0.88%, down 55% of the time. Friday after Thursday crash bounces 63% of the time, avg +2.5%.
lessons.fix: Thursday crash + Friday bounce is a tradeable pattern. Enter BULL at Friday open after Thursday crash, but half-size due to 37% continued-crash risk.

lessons.lesson: Liberation Day is the exception to the Thursday-Friday bounce pattern. Apr 2025: Thu -7.7% then Fri -8.6%. If the event has new information (tariff announcement), the crash continues. Check if there are actual new announcements vs just anniversary noise.
lessons.fix: Before trading the Friday bounce, web search for overnight developments. If new tariff action announced, skip the bounce trade.

lessons.lesson: TURBO warrants with close barriers are death traps on event days. TURBO L AVA 491 (barrier 8) got knocked out when silver dropped to 9.66. TURBO L AVA 481 (barrier 5) survived but lost 42%. Use no-knockout BULL/BEAR X5 certs on event days.
lessons.fix: Event day rule: ONLY use no-knockout instruments (BULL/BEAR X5). Never TURBOs or MINIs with barriers <15% from current price.

historical_analysis.crash_day_intraday_recovery: 22% average — crashes close near the low
historical_analysis.high_vol_week_fridays: Split 14 up / 8 down — not reliable direction
